en.k3d: 2 strength · 2 swims · 1 hike · 22,298 kg Hevy volume
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 3 – Jul 9 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 401 kcal/day, peaking 665 on Wednesday's pool-interval swim and 644 on Sunday's Zagreb hike. Monday (Jul 6) was a full rest day (63 kcal); Thursday (Jul 9) is just starting — squat session planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −815 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Thursday (Jul 9) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Wednesday's pool set was the week's hardest swim
en.i1: Wednesday's 2.2 km pool session (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 127, max 153, 65 min) drove 769 active kcal — the biggest single-session burn of the week and a clear step up in intensity from the easy open-water swims.
en.i2t: Two swims plus a hike carried the aerobic base
en.i2: Aerobic work came from Friday's easy 1.2 km Primošten open-water swim (avg HR 98), Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike (avg HR 117, 731 kcal) and Wednesday's harder pool intervals — a good mix of easy volume and one quality session.
en.i3t: Recovery: autonomics softened after a full week
en.i3: RHR climbed from 52 midweek to 58 this morning, its highest of the window; HRV fell to 32, eight below the 7-day baseline of 40. Last night was a shorter, fair one — 6h31 at score 77 — with strong deep sleep (1h57) but compressed REM (1h19).
en.i4t: Two lifts; hack squat still the tonnage leader
en.i4: Hevy tonnage this week: Saturday's trap-bar deadlift 8,312 kg and Tuesday's hack squat 13,986 kg — 22,298 kg across the two lifts. Tuesday's hack squat topped 150 kg with per-set HR peaks climbing 126 → 155.
en.rec: Thursday is a planned squat day. The week behind: 5 sessions across 5 active days (5h14, ~2,851 active kcal) — two strength lifts (trap-bar DL 8,312 kg, hack squat 13,986 kg; 22,298 kg total), two swims (an easy open-water 1.2 km and a harder 2.2 km pool set) and Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike. Monday was a full rest day. Recovery is the caution flag this morning: RHR is up to 58 and HRV down to 32 (eight below baseline) after a shorter, fair night — 6h31 at score 77. The dip is the cumulative cost of a full training week, not an injury signal, but it lands on a squat day — let the warm-up decide the top-set load rather than forcing it. Next: Sat trap-bar DL, then rest/hike Sunday per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-03 → 2026-07-09 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 2 plivanja · 1 planinarenje · 22.298 kg Hevy volumen
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 3.7. – 9.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 401 kcal/dan, vrhunac 665 na srijedinom plivanju s intervalima i 644 na nedjeljnom planinarenju u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak (6.7.) je bio potpuni dan odmora (63 kcal); četvrtak (9.7.) tek počinje — planiran trening čučnja.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −815 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Četvrtak (9.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Srijedin bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje tjedna
hr.i1: Srijedino plivanje 2,2 km u bazenu (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 127, maks 153, 65 min) donijelo je 769 aktivnih kcal — najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu i jasan skok intenziteta u odnosu na lagana plivanja na otvorenom.
hr.i2t: Dva plivanja i planinarenje držali su aerobnu bazu
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz petkovog laganog plivanja 1,2 km u Primoštenu (prosj. puls 98), nedjeljnog planinarenja 7,1 km u Zagrebu (prosj. puls 117, 731 kcal) i srijedinih težih bazenskih intervala — dobra mješavina lagane volumene i jednog kvalitetnog treninga.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: autonomika popustila nakon punog tjedna
hr.i3: RHR se popeo s 52 sredinom tjedna na 58 jutros, najviše u prikazanom razdoblju; HRV je pao na 32, osam ispod 7-dnevne osnovice od 40. Sinoć je bila kraća, osrednja — 6h31 uz ocjenu 77 — uz snažan duboki san (1h57) ali stisnut REM (1h19).
hr.i4t: Dva dizanja; hack squat i dalje vodi u tonaži
hr.i4: Hevy tonaža ovog tjedna: subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje 8.312 kg i utorkov hack squat 13.986 kg — ukupno 22.298 kg kroz dva dizanja. Utorkov hack squat dosegnuo je 150 kg uz vrhove pulsa po seriji koji rastu 126 → 155.
hr.rec: Četvrtak je planiran dan čučnja. Tjedan iza: 5 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (5h14, ~2.851 aktivnih kcal) — dva dizanja snage (trap-bar MD 8.312 kg, hack squat 13.986 kg; ukupno 22.298 kg), dva plivanja (lagano na otvorenom 1,2 km i teži bazenski set 2,2 km) i nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak je bio potpuni odmor. Oporavak je jutros znak opreza: RHR je na 58, a HRV pao na 32 (osam ispod osnovice) nakon kraće, osrednje noći — 6h31 uz ocjenu 77. Pad je kumulativna cijena punog tjedna treninga, ne znak ozljede, ali pada na dan čučnja — neka zagrijavanje odredi radnu težinu umjesto da je forsiraš. Sljedeće: sub trap-bar MD, zatim odmor/planinarenje u nedjelju po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 3.7. → 9.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
